item.name: Table Definitions
item.description:
# User Preferences API

## Base URL

`http://localhost:9001/kross-reaktor`

---

## Table Definitions

### Get all table definitions

**GET** `/api/v1/user-preferences/tables`

---

### Get a table definition by ID

**GET** `/api/v1/user-preferences/tables/{tableId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tableId | String | Yes | The table ID (e.g. `bookings`) |

---

### Create a table definition

**POST** `/api/v1/user-preferences/tables`

#### Request Body

``` json
{
    "tableId": "ops-reaktor:bookings",
    "columnKeys": [
        "internalId",
        "externalId",
        "bookingProductType",
        "bookingState",
        "bookingDate",
        "checkingDate",
        "checkoutDate",
        "consultantName",
        "clientName",
        "pvpValue",
        "netValue",
        "pointsCommissions",
        "distributionChannel",
        "paymentState",
        "documentationSent"
    ]
}

 ```

#### Examples

**Ops-Reaktor: Consultants**

``` json
{
    "tableId": "ops-reaktor:consultants",
    "columnKeys": [
        "name",
        "contacts",
        "level",
        "registerDate",
        "accountStatus",
        "commissionsStatus",
        "upline"
    ]
}

 ```

**Ops-Reaktor: Bookings**

``` json
{
    "tableId": "ops-reaktor:bookings",
    "columnKeys": [
        "internalId",
        "externalId",
        "bookingProductType",
        "bookingState",
        "bookingDate",
        "checkingDate",
        "checkoutDate",
        "consultantName",
        "clientName",
        "pvpValue",
        "netValue",
        "pointsCommissions",
        "distributionChannel",
        "paymentState",
        "documentationSent"
    ]
}

 ```

**Ops-Reaktor: Refunds**

``` json
{
    "tableId": "ops-reaktor:refunds",
    "columnKeys": [
        "ids",
        "saleSource",
        "state",
        "clientDetails",
        "clientIban",
        "refundValue"
    ]
}

 ```

**Ops-Reaktor: Payments**

``` json
{
    "tableId": "ops-reaktor:payments",
    "columnKeys": [
        "ids",
        "saleSource",
        "state",
        "partnerDetails",
        "checkinDate",
        "accountBalance",
        "pendingValue",
        "paidValue"
    ]
}

 ```

---

### Update a table definition

**PUT** `/api/v1/user-preferences/tables/{tableId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tableId | String | Yes | The table ID (e.g. `bookings`) |

#### Request Body

``` json
{
    "tableId": "ops-reaktor:bookings",
    "columnKeys": [
        "internalId",
        "externalId",
        "bookingProductType"
    ]
}

 ```

---

### Delete a table definition

**DELETE** `/api/v1/user-preferences/tables/{tableId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tableId | String | Yes | The table ID (e.g. `bookings`) |

item.name: Column Config

body.raw:
[
    { "columnKey": "bookingProductType", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "bookingState", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "bookingDate", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "checkingDate", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "checkoutDate", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "consultantName", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "clientName", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "pvpValue", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "netValue", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "pointsCommissions", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "distributionChannel", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "internalId", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "externalId", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "paymentState", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "documentationSent", "visible": false }
]

item.description:
## Column Config

### Get column configuration for a specific table

**GET** `/api/v1/user-preferences/column-config/{userId}/{tableId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userId | UUID | Yes | The user ID |
| tableId | String | Yes | The table ID (e.g. `ops-reaktor:bookings`) |

#### Example

`GET /api/v1/user-preferences/column-config/b67749a7-5e36-4a35-aa7f-a24df6f7a85d/ops-reaktor:bookings`

---

### Get all column configurations for a user

**GET** `/api/v1/user-preferences/column-config/{userId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userId | UUID | Yes | The user ID |

#### Example

`GET /api/v1/user-preferences/column-config/b67749a7-5e36-4a35-aa7f-a24df6f7a85d`

---

### Update column configuration for a specific table

**PATCH** `/api/v1/user-preferences/column-config/{userId}/{tableId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userId | UUID | Yes | The user ID |
| tableId | String | Yes | The table ID (e.g. `ops-reaktor:bookings`) |

#### Request Body

**Consultants**

``` json
[
    { "columnKey": "name", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "contacts", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "level", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "registerDate", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "accountStatus", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "commissionsStatus", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "upline", "visible": true }
]

 ```

**Bookings**

``` json
[
    { "columnKey": "internalId", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "externalId", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "bookingProductType", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "bookingState", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "bookingDate", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "checkingDate", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "checkoutDate", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "consultantName", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "clientName", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "pvpValue", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "netValue", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "pointsCommissions", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "distributionChannel", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "paymentState", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "documentationSent", "visible": false }
]

 ```

**Refunds**

``` json
[
    { "columnKey": "ids", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "saleSource", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "state", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "clientDetails", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "clientIban", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "refundValue", "visible": true }
]

 ```

**Payments**

``` json
[
    { "columnKey": "ids", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "saleSource", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "state", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "partnerDetails", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "checkinDate", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "accountBalance", "visible": false },
    { "columnKey": "pendingValue", "visible": true },
    { "columnKey": "paidValue", "visible": true }
]

 ```

item.name: Filter Groups
item.description:
## Filter Groups

### Get all filter groups for a user and table

**GET** `/api/v1/user-preferences/filter-groups/{userId}/{tableId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userId | UUID | Yes | The user ID |
| tableId | String | Yes | The table ID (e.g. `ops-reaktor:bookings`) |

#### Example

`GET /api/v1/user-preferences/filter-groups/b67749a7-5e36-4a35-aa7f-a24df6f7a85d/ops-reaktor:bookings`

---

### Create a filter group

**POST** `/api/v1/user-preferences/filter-groups/{userId}/{tableId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userId | UUID | Yes | The user ID |
| tableId | String | Yes | The table ID (e.g. `ops-reaktor:bookings`) |

#### Examples

**Bookings - Confirmed last 10 days**

``` json
{
    "name": "Confirmed last 10 days",
    "filters": {
        "bookingState": "CONFIRMED",
        "bookingDateStart": "2026-02-24",
        "bookingDateEnd": "2026-03-06"
    }
}

 ```

**Bookings - Pending flight + hotel**

``` json
{
    "name": "Pending flight + hotel",
    "filters": {
        "bookingState": "PENDING_APPROVAL",
        "productType": "FLIGHT_HOTEL",
        "pvpValueStart": 1000,
        "pvpValueEnd": 5000
    }
}

 ```

**Bookings - Alice's bookings this month**

``` json
{
    "name": "Alice's bookings this month",
    "filters": {
        "consultantName": "Alice Miranda",
        "bookingDateStart": "2026-03-01",
        "bookingDateEnd": "2026-03-31"
    }
}

 ```

**Refunds - Pending this month**

``` json
{
    "name": "Pending this month",
    "filters": {
        "status": ["PENDING"],
        "createdFrom": "2026-03-01",
        "createdTo": "2026-03-31"
    }
}

 ```

**Refunds - iCliGo Portugal pending**

``` json
{
    "name": "iCliGo Portugal pending",
    "filters": {
        "status": ["PENDING", "PROCESSING"],
        "distributionChannels": ["iCliGo Portugal"]
    }
}

 ```

**Consultants - Active gold level**

``` json
{
    "name": "Active gold level",
    "filters": {
        "levels": ["GOLD"],
        "userAccountStatus": ["ACTIVE"]
    }
}

 ```

**Consultants - Suspended commissions**

``` json
{
    "name": "Suspended commissions",
    "filters": {
        "commissionDrawStatus": ["SUSPENDED"],
        "userAccountStatus": ["ACTIVE"]
    }
}

 ```

---

### Update a filter group --- REVER (ERRO)

**PUT** `/api/v1/user-preferences/filter-groups/{userId}/{tableId}/{groupId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userId | UUID | Yes | The user ID |
| tableId | String | Yes | The table ID |
| groupId | String | Yes | The group ID returned from create |

#### Request Body

``` json
{
    "name": "Confirmed last 30 days",
    "filters": {
        "bookingState": "CONFIRMED",
        "bookingDateStart": "2026-02-04",
        "bookingDateEnd": "2026-03-06"
    }
}

 ```

---

### Delete a filter group

**DELETE** `/api/v1/user-preferences/filter-groups/{userId}/{tableId}/{groupId}`

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userId | UUID | Yes | The user ID |
| tableId | String | Yes | The table ID |
| groupId | String | Yes | The group ID returned from create |
